infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NirapodPoint needs your location to show nearby safety alerts and calculate safe routes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NirapodPoint needs your location to send emergency alerts and track your safety even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NirapodPoint needs camera access to let you capture and report crime incidents.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NirapodPoint needs microphone access for voice commands and emergency SOS features.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NirapodPoint needs photo library access to attach images to crime reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow NirapodPoint to use your location for safety alerts and emergency features.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow NirapodPoint to track your location in the background for continuous safety monitoring.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow NirapodPoint to access your location while using the app.
